caption: The video depicts a political event featuring Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi. He is wearing a white kurta and a saffron and green stole, standing before a backdrop composed of repeating lotus logos. Beside him is a large crowd of supporters, many of whom are wearing saffron caps and scarves. The frames show Modi gesturing with his arms and speaking to the audience. The screen is framed by an orange border featuring the lotus party symbol and the Hindi text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" (Bharatiya Janata Party Foundation Day). Additional text includes "प्रजाजनमेड़ी" on the left and "दिल्ली" (Delhi) on the right. At the bottom, a white banner displays "लाइव देखें" (Watch Live) alongside social media icons and handles for "/BJP4India" and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Across the frames, the camera slightly shifts and the crowd's expressions change as they listen to the speaker.
